mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_statistics_timeseries (server_id, channel_id, connector_id, ts, bucket_size_minutes, received, filtered, queued, sent, error) VALUES (#{serverId}, #{channelId}, #{connectorId}, #{ts}, #{bucketSizeMinutes}, #{received}, #{filtered}, #{queued}, #{sent}, #{error})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM message_statistics_timeseries WHERE server_id = #{serverId} AND bucket_size_minutes = #{bucketSizeMinutes} AND ts < #{cutoffTs}
